title: rhododendron ciliicalyx
intro: Rhododendron ciliicalyx, also known as the hairy-leaved azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the rhododendron family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Rhododendron ciliicalyx is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and its roots and leaves are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
